Our team is committed to making SeaSketc: Ua kŇępa Ľa kńĀ mńĀkou hui i ka ho Ľolilo  Ľana ińĀ SeaSketch i mea hiki i nńĀ mea ho Ľohana a pau, me ka po Ľe kńęnńĀ. We conducted a comprehensive review of t: Ua hana mńĀkou i kahi loiloi piha o ka  Ľao Ľao SeaSketch e ho Ľomaika Ľi i ke komo  Ľana.
